title: Convert YAML List to JSON Array
cap_description: Convert a YAML sequence to a JSON array
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a YAML sequence into a JSON array. Use this when downstream caps expect JSON but the upstream produces YAML.

## Inputs

A YAML sequence.

## Outputs

A JSON array.

## Notes

- Semantically lossless for all YAML types that JSON supports.
- For the reverse, use [Convert JSON Array to YAML List](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;list;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;textable;yaml").
